title: Torrezx-Bogged tools
description: set of weapons and tools inspired by the Bogged
body:
Torrezx-Bogged tools

ESPAÑOL:

Personaliza tus armas y herramientas con el nuevo set de Bogged,visita pantanos lodosos con estilo y lucha contra todos.

ENGLISH

Customize your weapons and tools with the new Bogged set, visit muddy swamps in style and fight against everyone.

Reemplaza/Replace:

-Diamond tools
-Bow

Requerimientos-Requirements:

-No requiere de ningún complemento-Does not require any complement

Twitter: [Torrezx](https://x.com/TorrezxMC)
